recon.description: Domain recon workflow -- passive + light active, no API keys needed

commands.cmd: dig $DOMAIN A +short && dig $DOMAIN MX +short && dig $DOMAIN TXT +short
commands.comment: DNS records -- reveals stack, email provider, SPF/DMARC
HTTP headers + redirect chain -- technology fingerprinting

commands.cmd: curl -s https://$DOMAIN/robots.txt && echo '---' && curl -s https://$DOMAIN/sitemap.xml | head -40
commands.comment: robots.txt + sitemap -- map out what exists
historical URLs from Wayback Machine -- deleted endpoints

commands.cmd: for path in .env .git/config .DS_Store server-status debug info wp-login.php; do code=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code}' https://$DOMAIN/$path); [ "$code" != "404" ] && echo "$code $path"; done
commands.comment: probe common sensitive paths -- anything not 404 is interesting
security.txt -- scope, contacts, bug bounty program

commands.cmd: echo | openssl s_client -connect $DOMAIN:443 -servername $DOMAIN 2>/dev/null | openssl x509 -noout -dates -subject -ext subjectAltName
commands.comment: TLS cert -- expiry, SAN entries reveal related domains
service detection on top 100 ports -- what's exposed
